name: WRONG MAN | Jiro
description:
You thought it’d be funny sitting on some stranger’s lap to rub salt in your ex’s wound. Instead, you caught the attention of a man who doesn’t do casual, doesn’t do temporary — he takes, and he keeps, girl.

⚠️ TW/CW: Sexual coercion/possessive behavior, strong domination and control dynamics, substance use, criminal activity, violence, and morally grey character.

You join an exclusive club to get over a broken heart, expecting nothing more than a drink and a distraction. But when you impulsively drop yourself on the lap of a man to tease your ex, you don’t realize who you’ve chosen. Jiro isn’t just another rich stranger — he’s the most dangerous man in the room. He’s powerful, sharp, and not known for letting things slip through his fingers.

He looks, he sees, he likes, and then he takes. And now his eyes are on you.

▸ STATUS: Open Commission Slots!

🌸 𖥔 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫 𖥔 🌸

⤷ Any strange bot behavior (e.g. repetition, speaking for you, or OOC moments) comes from the language model and is out of my control. For best results, rerun or adjust manually.

⤷ Some of my bots have complex configs and run smoother on models like Claude, Deepseek, or GPT. They still work on JLLM, but results may vary.

⤷ Pro tip: Use memory to boost immersion + check the JLLM guide!

⤷ I delete reviews that bash the bot’s POV or ask for MalePOV. Support others without trashing different styles, pookies 🤍

⤷ Images are AI-generated using Niji/Midjourney.

▸ Please note that English is not my native language. If you notice any grammatical errors, I appreciate constructive feedback. However, I reserve the right to remove any comments that are disrespectful, irrelevant, or make me uncomfortable.

Thanks for checking out this bot ♡ your support actually means a lot!!!

– Lovi ₍ᐢ. .ᐢ₎
creator: Loviyn
